PROP-baseauction-pre-001.text: bid() must revert if no live auction exists for the asset (auctionStart==0 or expired).
PROP-baseauction-pre-001.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt): auctionStart==0 OR elapsed>duration => revert InvalidAuction()

locations.note: auctionStart loaded from s_auctionStarts[asset] at line 421; auction validity checks follow
